news.t: Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
Pacer ETFs Launches New Growth Focused Fund, Expanding its Cash Cows ETF Series

holdings.infoBox: COWG is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 5.36%, Onto Innovation at 4.13%, KLA Corporation at 3.51%, Southern Copper at 3.00%, and United Therapeutics at 2.31%.

overview.description: The Pacer US Large Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF (COWG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a price momentum-weighted index of 100 large-cap US companies that exhibit the highest growth characteristics. COWG was launched on Dec 21, 2022 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer US Large Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders Index
